This linen is highly absorbent and dries quickly, ensuring comfort in both warm and cooler temperatures. Its durability and ability to resist fading also add to its long-term appeal.

description: Experience elegance with the Zeenat Black Co-ord Set , crafted from breathable lawn fabric for comfort and style. This ensemble includes a finely embroidered shirt, matching trousers. Originally priced at 2800PKR, now available for 1669PKR, offering exceptional value without compromising quality. Ideal for those seeking a sophisticated yet comfortable outfit for any occasion.
